Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.TacletIndex

  • Packages that use TacletIndex 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.proof  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof
    This package contains the core data structures of proofs, nodes, goals, as well as machinery to deal with these data structures.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
    This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.

      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.proof that return TacletIndex 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      abstract TacletIndex TacletIndex.copy()
      copies the index
      abstract TacletIndex TacletIndexKit.createTacletIndex()
      abstract factory method to create an empty TacletIndex
      abstract TacletIndex TacletIndexKit.createTacletIndex(java.lang.Iterable<Taclet> tacletSet)
      abstract factory method to create a TacletIndex containing the provided taclets
      TacletIndex Goal.indexOfTaclets()
      returns the Taclet index for this goal.
      TacletIndex RuleAppIndex.tacletIndex()
      returns the Taclet index for this ruleAppIndex.
      TacletIndex TacletAppIndex.tacletIndex()
      returns the Taclet index for this ruleAppIndex.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      TermTacletAppIndex TermTacletAppIndex.addTaclets(RuleFilter filter, PosInOccurrence pos, Services services, TacletIndex tacletIndex, NewRuleListener listener)
      Create a new tree of indices that additionally contain the taclets that are selected by filter

      Create an index that additionally contains the taclets that are selected by filter

      Create an index for the given term
      void ProgVarReplacer.replace(TacletIndex tacletIndex)
      replaces in the partially instantiated apps of a taclet index

      called if a formula has been replaced

      TacletIndex InitConfig.createTacletIndex()
      returns a newly created taclet index for the set of activated taclets contained in this initial configuration
